title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js that teaches developers about Gen AI through gameplay. It uses Gemma 4 open weights model to enable NPCs to generate code and autonomous behavior via prompting and tool calls. The game demonstrates multiple model-serving options including local inference via Transformers.js, Ollama, and LM Studio, as well as cloud deployment via Gemini API and Google Cloud.
writeup: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler built on Angular and Phaser.js that teaches Gen AI concepts through gameplay. It runs the Gemma 4 open weights model to let NPCs generate code and act autonomously through prompting and tool calls. The video shows multiple model-serving paths: local inference via Transformers.js, Ollama, and LM Studio, plus cloud deployment through the Gemini API and Google Cloud. Covered concepts include vibe coding, agentic development, tool use, self-correcting loops, and model loading.
